predicates.name: provides_proof_of_belgian_nationality
predicates.description: The person provides proof that they possess Belgian nationality.

predicates.name: is_alien
predicates.description: The person is an alien because they do not provide proof of Belgian nationality.

predicates.name: is_union_citizen
predicates.description: The person is a Union citizen.

predicates.name: enjoys_community_right_of_free_movement
predicates.description: The person enjoys the Community right of free movement as defined in Article 2, point 5, of the Schengen Borders Code.

predicates.name: is_third_country_national
predicates.description: The person is a third-country national: not a Union citizen and not enjoying the Community right of free movement.

predicates.name: is_present_on_territory
predicates.description: The alien is present on the territory.

predicates.name: meets_conditions_for_entry_or_stay
predicates.description: The alien meets or continues to meet the conditions for entry to or stay on the territory.

predicates.name: has_illegal_stay
predicates.description: The alien has illegal stay: present on the territory and not meeting conditions for entry or stay.

predicates.name: possesses_valid_travel_document
predicates.description: The alien is in possession of a valid travel document.

predicates.name: possesses_valid_passport
predicates.description: The alien is in possession of a valid passport.

predicates.name: possesses_valid_identity_document
predicates.description: The alien is in possession of a valid identity document.

predicates.name: recognised_as_national_by_national_authority
predicates.description: The alien has been recognised as a national by the national authority of their country.

predicates.name: national_authority_willing_to_issue_laissez_passer
predicates.description: The national authority of the alien's country has declared itself willing to issue a laissez-passer.

predicates.name: falls_within_nationality_category_for_ministerial_laissez_passer
predicates.description: The alien falls within the category of nationalities for which the minister may personally issue a laissez-passer.

predicates.name: is_identified_alien
predicates.description: The alien is an identified alien based on possession of valid documents, national authority recognition, or ministerial laissez-passer category.

predicates.name: subject_to_removal_procedure
predicates.description: The alien is the subject of a removal procedure.

predicates.name: subject_to_international_protection_procedure
predicates.description: The alien is the subject of a procedure for the granting of international protection.

predicates.name: subject_to_responsible_member_state_determination_procedure
predicates.description: The alien is the subject of a procedure for determining or transferring to the Member State responsible for examining the application for international protection.

predicates.name: reasons_to_believe_will_abscond
predicates.description: There are reasons to believe that the alien will abscond, having regard to the listed criteria.

predicates.name: individual_examination_performed
predicates.description: An individual examination of the alien has been performed for the purpose of establishing a risk of absconding.

predicates.name: risk_of_absconding_based_on_objective_criteria
predicates.description: The risk of absconding is established on the basis of one or more objective criteria listed in paragraph 2, taking into account all circumstances specific to the case.

predicates.name: risk_of_absconding_is_current_and_real
predicates.description: The risk of absconding for the alien is current and real.

predicates.name: risk_of_absconding_exists
predicates.description: A risk of absconding exists for the alien, established following individual examination and objective criteria.

predicates.name: no_residence_application_criterion_met
predicates.description: The no-residence-application criterion is met: the person did not submit a residence application after illegal entry or during illegal stay, or did not make their international protection application within the required time limit.

predicates.name: did_not_submit_residence_application_after_illegal_entry_or_during_illegal_stay
predicates.description: The person did not submit a residence application following their illegal entry or during their illegal stay.

predicates.name: did_not_submit_international_protection_application_in_time
predicates.description: The person did not make their application for international protection within the time limit provided for by the Act.

predicates.name: false_information_criterion_met
predicates.description: The false-information criterion is met: the person used false or misleading information, false or forged documents, committed fraud, or used other unlawful means in a relevant procedure.

predicates.name: used_false_or_misleading_information_or_documents
predicates.description: The person used false or misleading information or false or forged documents in a procedure for international protection, residence, removal, or refusal of entry.

predicates.name: committed_fraud_or_used_unlawful_means_in_procedure
predicates.description: The person committed fraud or used other unlawful means in a procedure for international protection, residence, removal, or refusal of entry.

predicates.name: non_cooperation_criterion_met
predicates.description: The non-cooperation criterion is met: the person does not cooperate or has not cooperated with authorities responsible for access, residence, establishment, and removal regulations.

predicates.name: does_not_cooperate_with_relevant_authorities
predicates.description: The person does not cooperate or has not cooperated with authorities responsible for implementation of or supervision of compliance with regulations concerning access, residence, establishment, and removal of aliens.

predicates.name: non_compliance_criterion_met
predicates.description: The non-compliance criterion is met: the person has indicated unwillingness to comply with or has already failed to comply with a transfer, refusal-of-entry, removal, entry ban, less coercive, liberty-restricting, or equivalent Member State measure.

predicates.name: non_compliant_with_transfer_refusal_or_removal_measure
predicates.description: The person has made clear they do not wish to comply with a transfer, refusal-of-entry, or removal measure, or has already failed to comply with such a measure.

predicates.name: non_compliant_with_entry_ban
predicates.description: The person has made clear they do not wish to comply with an entry ban that has neither been lifted nor suspended, or has already failed to comply with such a ban.

predicates.name: non_compliant_with_less_coercive_measure
predicates.description: The person has made clear they do not wish to comply with a less coercive measure than deprivation of liberty aimed at guaranteeing transfer, refusal of entry, or removal, or has already failed to comply with such a measure.

predicates.name: non_compliant_with_liberty_restricting_measure_for_public_order
predicates.description: The person has made clear they do not wish to comply with a liberty-restricting measure aimed at guaranteeing public order or national security, or has already failed to comply with such a measure.

predicates.name: non_compliant_with_equivalent_member_state_measure
predicates.description: The person has made clear they do not wish to comply with a measure taken by another Member State equivalent to a transfer, refusal-of-entry, removal, entry ban, less coercive, or liberty-restricting measure, or has already failed to comply with such a measure.

predicates.name: entry_ban_criterion_met
predicates.description: The entry-ban criterion is met: the person is subject to an entry ban in the Kingdom or another Member State that has neither been lifted nor suspended.

predicates.name: subject_to_unlifted_entry_ban
predicates.description: The person is the subject of an entry ban in the Kingdom or in another Member State that has neither been lifted nor suspended.

predicates.name: new_application_criterion_met
predicates.description: The new-application criterion is met: the person submitted a new residence or international protection application immediately after a negative decision.

predicates.name: submitted_new_application_after_negative_decision
predicates.description: The person submitted a new residence application or a new application for international protection immediately after having been the subject of a decision refusing entry or residence, a decision terminating their stay, or a refusal-of-entry or removal measure.

predicates.name: concealment_of_fingerprints_criterion_met
predicates.description: The concealment-of-fingerprints criterion is met: the person concealed having already provided fingerprints in another State bound by European regulations on determining the responsible State for international protection.

predicates.name: concealed_prior_fingerprints_in_other_state
predicates.description: While being questioned on that point, the person concealed the fact that they had already provided their fingerprints in another State bound by the European regulations concerning the determination of the State responsible for examining an application for international protection, after having submitted an application for international protection.

predicates.name: multiple_applications_criterion_met
predicates.description: The multiple-applications criterion is met: the person submitted multiple applications for international protection or residence in the Kingdom or other Member States resulting in negative decisions or no residence permit.

predicates.name: submitted_multiple_applications_with_negative_outcome
predicates.description: The person submitted multiple applications for international protection or multiple residence applications in the Kingdom or in one or more other Member States, which have given rise to a negative decision or which have not resulted in the issuance of a residence permit.

predicates.name: concealment_of_prior_application_criterion_met
predicates.description: The concealment-of-prior-application criterion is met: the person concealed having previously submitted an international protection application in another State bound by European regulations.

predicates.name: concealed_prior_application_in_other_state
predicates.description: While being questioned on that point, the person concealed the fact that they had previously submitted an application for international protection in another State bound by the European regulations concerning the determination of the State responsible for examining an application for international protection.

predicates.name: declared_other_purpose_criterion_met
predicates.description: The declared-other-purpose criterion is met: the person declared or it appears from their file that they came to the Kingdom for purposes other than those for which they submitted an application for international protection or a residence application.

predicates.name: came_for_purpose_other_than_application_purpose
predicates.description: The person declared, or it appears from their file, that they came to the Kingdom for purposes other than those for which they submitted an application for international protection or a residence application.

predicates.name: manifestly_unlawful_appeal_criterion_met
predicates.description: The manifestly-unlawful-appeal criterion is met: the person is the subject of a fine because they submitted a manifestly unlawful appeal to the Council for Alien Law Litigation.

predicates.name: subject_to_fine_for_manifestly_unlawful_appeal
predicates.description: The person is the subject of a fine because they submitted a manifestly unlawful appeal to the Council for Alien Law Litigation.
